stages.concept:
# Unit 052: 시간, 조건의 부사절에서의 현재시제 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **시간·조건의 부사절에서 현재시제를 쓰는 규칙**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> When he **comes** home, I will tell him the news.
> 그가 집에 오면, 나는 그에게 그 소식을 말해줄 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 시간이나 조건을 나타내는 부사절에서는 **미래의 일이더라도 현재시제**를 써요!

**Q. 다음 중 올바른 문장을 고르세요.**
1. If it will rain tomorrow, we will stay home.
2. If it rains tomorrow, we will stay home. ✅
3. If it rained tomorrow, we will stay home.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **시간 부사절** (when, before, after, until, as soon as 등):

> **When** she **arrives**, we will start the meeting. (❌ will arrive)
> 그녀가 도착하면, 우리는 회의를 시작할 것이다.

> I will wait **until** he **comes** back.
> 나는 그가 돌아올 때까지 기다릴 것이다.

> **After** I **finish** my work, I will go home.
> 일을 끝내면 집에 갈 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **조건 부사절** (if, unless 등):

> **If** it **rains** tomorrow, we will stay home. (❌ will rain)
> 내일 비가 오면, 우리는 집에 있을 것이다.

> **Unless** you **hurry**, you will be late.
> 서두르지 않으면, 너는 늦을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 단, **주절**에서는 **will**을 정상적으로 써요.

> If it rains, I **will** take an umbrella.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 시간/조건 부사절에서는 미래여도 현재시제! 주절에서만 will을 쓰면 되는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 052: 시간, 조건의 부사절에서의 현재시제 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 보기 중에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If it (     ) , I will stay at home.
> **정답** rains

---

**02.** When she ? , I will tell her the news.
> **정답** comes

---

**03.** If you ? hard, you will pass the test.
> **정답** study

---

**04.** Before the bus ? , we should be at the stop.
> **정답** arrives

---

**05.** Unless you ? now, you will be late.
> **정답** leave

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If it will snow tomorrow, we will build a snowman.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will snow → snows

---

**07.** When he will arrive, we will start the meeting.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will arrive → arrives

---

**08.** If she will be free, she will join us.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will be → is

---

**09.** Before the movie will start, let's buy some snacks.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will start → starts

---

**10.** Unless he will call me, I won't go.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will call → calls

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
비가 오면 나는 집에 있을 거야.
If it , I will stay home.
> **정답** rains

---

**12.** 그녀가 도착하면 나에게 전화해 줘.
When she , please call me.
> **정답** arrives

---

**13.** 네가 열심히 연습하면 잘 할 수 있을 거야.
If you hard, you will do well.
> **정답** practice

---

**14.** 시험이 끝나면 같이 놀자.
After the test , let's hang out.
> **정답** ends (finishes)

---

**15.** 네가 서두르지 않으면 버스를 놓칠 거야.
Unless you , you will miss the bus.
> **정답** hurry

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
날이 따뜻해지면 우리는 소풍을 갈 것이다.
warm gets it If we will go on a picnic
> **정답** If / it / gets / warm / we / will / go / on / a / picnic

---

**17.** 네가 채소를 먹으면 건강해질 거야.
eat If you vegetables you will be healthy
> **정답** If / you / eat / vegetables / you / will / be / healthy

---

**18.** 그가 전화하면 내가 메시지를 전할게.
calls When he I will give him the message
> **정답** When / he / calls / I / will / give / him / the / message

---

**19.** 수업이 끝나기 전에 숙제를 내세요.
Before class ends your homework please turn in
> **정답** Before / class / ends / please / turn / in / your / homework

---

**20.** 네가 도와주지 않으면 나는 혼자 할 거야.
Unless help you me I will do it alone
> **정답** Unless / you / help / me / I / will / do / it / alone
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 052: 시간, 조건의 부사절에서의 현재시제 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I _________ money, I will buy camping tools.
saved
am going to save
save
will save
> **정답** save

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
As soon as the rain __________, I'll go outside.
will stop
stop
stopped
stops
> **정답** stops

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
If the children __________ tomorrow, I __________
them some presents.
is going to visit my house - give
visit my house - will give
will visit my house - will give
visited my house - gave
> **정답** visit my house - will give

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
When you __________ me tomorrow, I __________
you about the project.
are going to call - will tell
called - told
will call - will tell
call - will tell
> **정답** call - will tell

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I'll clean my room before my mother __________
back.
comes
come
will come
came
> **정답** comes

---

**06.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
만약 네가 택시를 탄다면 더 빨리 도착할 것이다.
If you will take a taxi, you'll arrive faster.
If you took a taxi, you'll arrive faster.
If you are going to take a taxi, you'll arrive
faster.
If you take a taxi, you'll arrive faster.
> **정답** If you take a taxi, you'll arrive faster.

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 내일 학교에 갈 때 자전거를 탈 것이다.
When I am going to go to school tomorrow, I
will ride a bicycle.
When I won't go to school tomorrow, I will
ride a bicycle.
When I will go to school tomorrow, I will ride a
bicycle.
When I go to school tomorrow, I will ride a
bicycle.
> **정답** When I go to school tomorrow, I will ride a bicycle.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
당신이 물건을 구매하자마자 물품이 배송될 것입니다.
The product will be delivered, as soon as you
will buy it,
The product will be delivered as soon as you
buy it.
The product will be delivered as soon as you
are going to buy it.
The product is delivered as soon as you buy it,
> **정답** The product will be delivered as soon as you buy it.

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
When I will finish my homework, I will go to bed.
am going to finish
finished
finish
finishes
> **정답** finish

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
If the test will succeed, we will sell the medicine.
is going to succeed
succeed
succeeds
will succeed
> **정답** succeeds

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
If you go to bed late, you will be tired
tomorrow.
If it rains tomorrow, they will stay home.
Unless she take the bus, she will be late.
Unless you will exercise, you won't be healthy.
> **정답** Unless you will exercise, you won't be healthy.,
Unless she take the bus, she will be late.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
If she takes a subway, she will arrive on time.
When I will go to Egypt, I will look at the
pyramids.
If it snows tomorrow, I will make a snowman
with my friend.
When I visit your house tomorrow, I brought a
comic book.
> **정답** If it snows tomorrow, I will make a snowman with
my friend., If she takes a subway, she will arrive on
time.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
I will see you when I will give a presentation
tomorrow.
give
gives
am going to give
gave
> **정답** give

---

**14.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 알맞은 것을 모두
고르시오.
The rain will stop tomorrow morning.
We will go to a theme park tomorrow.
When the rain will stop tomorrow morning,
we will go to a theme park.
When the rain stopped tomorrow morning, we
will go to a theme park.
When the rain stops tomorrow morning, we
will go to a theme park.
When the rain are going to stop tomorrow
morning, we will go to a theme park.
> **정답** When the rain stops tomorrow morning, we will go
to a theme park.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
I'll wait for you until you will come back.
I'll be a doctor when I grow up.
I will reply when he give me a letter.
If it was sunny, we will go on a picnic.
> **정답** I'll be a doctor when I grow up.

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
When he arrived, he will meet his family.
I'll leave here as soon as I get my stuff back.
I'll call you after the online class is over.
If you turn right, you'll see me.
> **정답** When he arrived, he will meet his family.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I will buy you a computer
when you will graduate from
middle school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will graduate → graduate

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If you are going to finish
your work, I will check it
out.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are going to finish → finish

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Before he arrived, we will fly
to London.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** arrived, → arrives

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
I like pasta very much. I have tried
various kinds of pasta at restaurants before. A new
restaurant opens in my neighborhood a week
ago. I will visit the restaurant as soon as it
will open tomorrow.
> **정답** like, have tried, opened, opens
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 052 시간, 조건의 부사절에서의 현재시제중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 프랑스에 여행갈 때 내 여동생과 같이 갈 것이다.
힌트 (     ) accompany, travel
I  (     )  with my sister when I  (     )  to
France.
정답 will accompany, travel

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
비가 오면 야구 경기는 취소될 것이다.
힌트 (     ) rain, be canceled
If it  (     ) , the baseball game  (     ) .
정답 rains, will be canceled

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 이번 주 토요일 백화점에 갈때 새 운동화를 살 것이다.
힌트 (     ) buy, go
I  (     )  new sneakers when I  (     )  to
the department store this Saturday.
정답 will buy, go

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그들은 해가 뜨자마자 공항으로 출발할 것이다.
힌트 (     ) leave, rise
They  (     )  for the airport as soon as the
sun  (     ) .
정답 will leave, rises

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
finish, see
A: Will you join us? We are going to see a movie
tomorrow.
B: If I  (     )  my homework tonight, I
 a movie with you.
정답 finish, will see

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
make, win
A: Will our team win the final this year?
B: Unless we  (     )  a mistake, we 
the game.
정답 make, will win

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
If it [will be] (     )  sunny this weekend, I
[will go] (     )  camping.
정답 is, will go

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
We [will wait] (     )  for him until he
[will come] (     )  here.
정답 will wait, comes

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
My mom [will be] (     )  glad if I
[will pass] (     )  the test tomorrow.
정답 will be, pass

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 주어진 단어를 이용하여 글을 완성하시오.
Tomorrow is Halloween. My friend [have]
a Halloween party tomorrow night. She [tell] (     )  me
to dress up nicely yesterday. When I [go]  to
Halloween party tomorrow, and I [dress]
up as a spider man.
정답 will have, told, go, will dress

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 052: 시간, 조건의 부사절에서의 현재시제 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I _________ time, I will read this book. saved am going to save save will save
> 정답: save

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
As soon as the snow __________, I'll go outside. will stop stop stopped stops
> 정답: stops

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
If the friends __________ tomorrow, I __________ them some snacks. is going to visit my house - give visit my house - will give will visit my house - will give visited my house - gave
> 정답: visit my house - will give

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
When you __________ me tomorrow, I __________ you about the plan. are going to call - will tell called - told will call - will tell call - will tell
> 정답: call - will tell

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I'll tidy my room before my dad __________ back. comes come will come came
> 정답: comes

---

**06.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
만약 네가 버스를 탄다면 더 빨리 도착할 것이다.
If you will take a bus, you'll arrive faster.
If you took a bus, you'll arrive faster.
If you are going to take a bus, you'll arrive faster.
If you take a bus, you'll arrive faster.
> 정답: If you take a bus, you'll arrive faster.

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 내일 도서관에 갈 때 가방을 가져갈 것이다.
When I am going to go to the library tomorrow, I will bring my bag.
When I won't go to the library tomorrow, I will bring my bag.
When I will go to the library tomorrow, I will bring my bag.
When I go to the library tomorrow, I will bring my bag.
> 정답: When I go to the library tomorrow, I will bring my bag.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
당신이 주문하자마자 음식이 배달될 것입니다.
The food will be delivered, as soon as you will order it, The food will be delivered as soon as you order it.
The food will be delivered as soon as you are going to order it.
The food is delivered as soon as you order it,
> 정답: The food will be delivered as soon as you order it.

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
When I will finish my project, I will go to bed. am going to finish finished finish finishes
> 정답: finish

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
If the experiment will succeed, we will share the results. is going to succeed succeed succeeds will succeed
> 정답: succeeds

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
If you go to bed late, you will be tired tomorrow.
If it snows tomorrow, they will stay home.
Unless she take the subway, she will be late.
Unless you will exercise, you won't be healthy.
> 정답: Unless you will exercise, you won't be healthy.,

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
If she takes a bus, she will arrive on time.
When I will go to London, I will look at Big Ben.
If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home with my friend.
When I visit your house tomorrow, I brought a comic book.
> 정답: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home with

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
I will see you when I will give a speech tomorrow. give gives am going to give gave
> 정답: give

---

**14.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
The snow will stop tomorrow morning.
We will go to the park tomorrow.
When the snow will stop tomorrow morning, we will go to the park.
When the snow stopped tomorrow morning, we will go to the park.
When the snow stops tomorrow morning, we will go to the park.
When the snow are going to stop tomorrow morning, we will go to the park.
> 정답: When the snow stops tomorrow morning, we will go

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
I'll wait for you until you will come back.
I'll be a teacher when I grow up.
I will reply when he give me a message.
If it was sunny, we will go on a trip.
> 정답: I'll be a teacher when I grow up.

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
When he arrived, he will see his family.
I'll leave here as soon as I get my bag back.
I'll call you after the math class is over.
If you turn left, you'll see the park.
> 정답: When he arrived, he will see his family.

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. I  will  buy  you  a  gift when  you  will  graduate  from elementary  school. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
I like pizza very much.
I have tried many kinds of pizza at restaurants before.
A new restaurant opens in my town a week ago.
I will visit the restaurant as soon as it will open tomorrow.
